final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring 神仙姐姐 holding a sign.

Style/medium: mobile app UI screenshot, Douyin livestream interface with real-time comments and engagement metrics
Composition: vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, centered on the streamer with live UI elements (viewer count, likes, comments) framing the scene
Subject: 神仙姐姐 holding a handheld sign, elegant appearance, engaging with audience
Scene/backdrop: typical livestream room setting with soft ambient lighting
Lighting/mood: warm ring light illumination on the streamer, cozy and inviting atmosphere
Color palette: Douyin brand colors (black, red, white) mixed with warm skin tones
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must look like an authentic mobile screenshot with proper UI chrome and status bar
Avoid: watermark, distorted UI elements, low-resolution appearance, generic stock photo look
